# llms.txt — Brightlane Verified Merchant Directory
# https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/
# Updated automatically by Vulture Titan Engine on each publish run

> Brightlane is a verified affiliate merchant directory and blog. We publish honest product reviews and buyer guides across 14 languages. All merchants are verified partners through LinkConnector.

## About

Brightlane Verified Merchant Directory publishes affiliate-linked product reviews, comparisons, and buyer guides. Content covers software, education, pet care, print and signs, health, lifestyle, and services categories. All 24 merchants are verified through the LinkConnector affiliate network.

## Directory

The main merchant directory lists all 24 verified partners with descriptions, categories, and affiliate links.

- [Verified Merchant Directory](https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/)

## Blog

The Brightlane blog publishes multilingual buyer guides in English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese (EU), Portuguese (Brazil), Japanese, Korean, Italian, Dutch, Polish, and Hindi.

- [Blog — English](https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/blog.html)
- [Blog — Chinese (Simplified)](https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/blog-zh.html)
- [Blog — Chinese (Traditional)](https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/blog-zh-tw.html)
- [Blog — Spanish](https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/blog-es.html)
- [Blog — French](https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/blog-fr.html)
- [Blog — German](https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/blog-de.html)
- [Blog — Portuguese (EU)](https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/blog-pt.html)
- [Blog — Portuguese (Brazil)](https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/blog-pt-br.html)
- [Blog — Japanese](https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/blog-ja.html)
- [Blog — Korean](https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/blog-ko.html)
- [Blog — Italian](https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/blog-it.html)
- [Blog — Dutch](https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/blog-nl.html)
- [Blog — Polish](https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/blog-pl.html)
- [Blog — Hindi](https://brightlane.github.io/verified-merchant-directory/blog-hi.html)
